zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏多整理
zh.content:
目前BTC/USD价格维持在77025附近，接近20日均线76836，短期走势呈现震荡整理格局。价格在高位77110和低位76918间波动，说明多空力量暂时均衡，短线趋势尚未出现明确突破信号。

MACD显示主线为-181.72，尚未形成金叉，暗示上行动能有限，短线上涨或受抑制。虽然RSI数据缺失，但结合价格维持于均线之上，可判断市场整体偏多，但动力不足，需要关注动能指标确认进一步方向。

支撑位主要在76900-76800区域，若价格回落至此区间可提供一定支撑；阻力位在77100-77200附近，突破后有望打开上行空间。均线和成交量的配合将是判断突破有效性的关键。

交易策略上，建议短线以震荡操作为主，可在支撑区轻仓布局多单，止损控制在76750下方；上方阻力位附近可考虑减仓或短线高抛。中长线投资者仍可维持观望，等待明确趋势信号再行加仓，以降低波动风险。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin's price action around $77,025 shows a market hovering near a short-term equilibrium. The narrow high-low range of $77,110 to $76,918 over the past 24 hours indicates consolidation, suggesting neither bulls nor bears have strong momentum. The current price slightly above the 20-period SMA at $76,836 suggests mild bullish bias, but the negligible 24-hour change signals indecision. Traders should watch for a breakout above $77,200 or a drop below $76,900 to confirm directional strength.  

The MACD reading of -181.72 points to ongoing bearish pressure despite the SMA alignment. Without the signal line, interpretation is limited, but the negative value indicates momentum is still weighted toward sellers. The absence of a current RSI limits overbought/oversold insights, so price action and volume patterns gain importance. Any sustained move above the SMA could shift momentum into neutral-to-bullish territory, while a breakdown could reinforce short-term selling pressure.  

Key support appears near $76,900, reinforced by the SMA acting as a dynamic floor. Resistance sits around $77,110–$77,200, a range that has capped recent upside. Traders could consider short-term range-bound strategies, buying near support with tight stops and targeting the upper resistance. Breakouts with high volume should trigger trend-following setups, whereas failed attempts at resistance may favor scalping or contrarian shorts.  

In conclusion, BTC/USD is consolidating with slight bullish undertones but under subdued momentum. Trend-following traders should wait for clear breakout confirmations, while swing traders can exploit the narrow intraday range. Monitoring SMA interaction, price volume spikes, and MACD trajectory will be crucial for assessing whether a breakout will sustain or revert. Short-term risk management remains critical in this low-volatility environment.
